items.title: AI Impact: How AI Raised the Bar for Lawyers - Newsweek
items.summary: # AI Impact: How AI Raised the Bar for Lawyers. ## AI Impact examines legal AI workloads, hidden productivity costs, finance transformation and AI-powered health care claims. *Editor's note: This is AI Impact, Newsweek's weekly newsletter where each week, we will explore how business leaders are unlocking real value through artificial intelligence.*. #### Read More on AI. AI is now changing that reputation, though not in the way many lawyers may have expected. Ironclad, an AI contracting platform, found in its third annual “State of AI in Legal” report that 92 percent of legal professionals now use AI in some capacity for legal work, up from 69 percent in 2025. “AI is not just reducing workload; it is changing what legal teams are expected to deliver,” Jasmine Singh, general counsel at Ironclad, told *Newsweek*. Ironclad found that 94 percent of respondents who use AI for legal work use it for contract-specific tasks.

items.title: Acrisure: How AI is the Critical Core Engine for Growth - FinTech Magazine
items.summary: # Acrisure: How AI is the Critical Core Engine for Growth. Benjamin Funk, Chief Technology & AI Officer at Acrisure, explains how the company’s implementation of AI at its core is key to its success. For the modern business, AI is more than just a means to an end. Aside from the front-end benefits focused on efficiency, AI is adopting a vital role in every boardroom: strategy. Simply put, AI is more than a tool in fintech. It is rapidly becoming the solution to every company’s growth strategy. In this Q&A with FinTech Magazine, Benjamin Funk, Chief Technology & AI Officer at Acrisure, explains how Acrisure’s AI strategy is the core of its operation. At Acrisure, I’m now leading technology, innovation, and AI across our engineering, data, analytics, product, sales tech and agentic automation teams. Not as an overlay, but as a critical and core engine for how a business ought to run.

items.title: AI Startup Artisan Accused of Stealing ‘This is Fine’ Comic Art - Startup Ecosystem Canada
items.summary: By Startup Eco SystemNo Comments. ## AI Startup Artisan Accused of Stealing ‘This is Fine’ Comic Art. KC Green, the artist behind the popular ‘This is fine’ meme, has accused AI startup Artisan of using his artwork without permission in an advertisement campaign. The ad, spotted in a subway station, altered Green’s original comic to promote ‘Ava the AI BDR’. Artisan responded by expressing respect for Green and has planned to discuss the matter with him directly. #### ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art. acquisition AI AI development AI infrastructure AI innovation AI integration AI investment AI models AI safety AI technology Amazon Anthropic Apple Artificial Intelligence Autonomous vehicles Canada founder news Canada startup news ChatGPT cryptocurrency Cybersecurity Electric Vehicles Elon Musk entrepreneurship fintech Funding round Generative AI Global founder news Global startup news healthcare innovation Innovation investment IPO Meta Microsoft Nvidia Ontario startup news OpenAI Sam Altman Seed funding Silicon Valley TechCrunch Disrupt Tech innovation Tesla Toronto startup news venture capital.

items.title: “Manufacturing Sites are the Core of AI Competition”... Ibex Unveils Industrial Physical AI Strategy at AWC 2026 - 벤처스퀘어
items.summary: # “Manufacturing Sites are the Core of AI Competition”… Ibex Unveils Industrial Physical AI Strategy at AWC 2026. On the 27th, AIVEX gave a presentation on the topic of "Industrial Physical AI Technology Trends and Applications" at the "AI World Congress 2026 (AWC 2026)" held at Ajou University. In this announcement, the company explained that the era of 'Physical AI,' where AI perceives, judges, and acts upon the real physical world—moving beyond Generative and Agentic AI—is beginning in earnest. It explained that AI, which used to understand language and knowledge through text-based learning, is now evolving to a stage where it understands and interacts with the physical environment based on video and behavioral data. Seong Min-soo, CEO of Ibex, stated, “The center of AI is expanding beyond generative AI in the digital space to physical AI operating in actual industrial sites,” adding, “We will lead the advancement of manufacturing AI through AI Vision and AI Robotics technologies optimized for manufacturing environments.”.

items.title: AI & Tech Brief: Trump admin to test frontier models - The Washington Post
items.summary: AI & Tech Brief from WP Intelligence. # AI & Tech Brief: Trump admin to test frontier models. Plus, why the entry of financial giants in AI forecasts “token inequality.”. Make us preferred on Google. Sign up here to get this newsletter in your inbox. * The Commerce Department announced Tuesday that it will be conducing pre-deployment testing of AI models from Google, Microsoft and xAI. This marks a pivot in the White House’s earlier approach to AI policy. * I break down what the new partnership between Anthropic and financial services firms means for business adoption of AI. Expect more inequality between the capabilities of AI start-ups and the AI firms with larger financial resources. * A new WP Intelligence report analyzes the bottlenecks in physical AI, including in the proprietary data needed to train robots.

items.title: Column: Tin re-balances but investors are still betting on scarcity - Mining.com
items.summary: Silver Futures $ 75.495 / ozt  7.47%. Micro Gold Futures $ 4713.1 / ozt  3.80%. Micro Silver Futures $ 75.48 / ozt  7.54%. Gold Futures $ 4713.3 / ozt  3.84%. LME three-month tin is trading at $55,225 per metric ton, close to the all-time high of $59,040 reached during the frenzied cross-metals rally in January. The London tin price is up by 36% since the start of the year. The next best performer is aluminum, which has risen by 23% and is experiencing an unprecedented supply shock after the loss of Gulf production due to the Iran war. Tin supply has no direct exposure to the war in the Gulf, unlike aluminum, nickel and copper. Global mine production is on course to grow by a healthy 8.7% this year, according to the International Tin Association (ITA). Production at the Bisie mine in the Democratic Republic of Congo is stable after last year’s brief closure due to encroaching M23 insurgents.

items.title: Lead-Free Perovskites Push Solar Cells Toward Safer High-Efficiency Designs - AZoM
items.summary: **By replacing toxic lead with safer alternatives such as tin, bismuth, antimony, and double perovskites, researchers are charting a path toward next-generation solar cells that could combine high performance with improved environmental safety.**. Image 4: Figure oulined the schematic representation of lead-free perovskite structure (A site represents monovalent cation, X represents a halide anion with bi/trivalent cation from each type of perovskite family) and the year-wise progression of the most efficient PSCs from each lead-free perovskite family from 2016 to 2025. _Figure oulined the schematic representation of lead-free perovskite structure (A site represents monovalent cation, X represents a halide anion with bi/trivalent cation from each type of perovskite family) and the year-wise progression of the most efficient PSCs from each lead-free perovskite family from 2016 to 2025._. The review highlighted key design approaches that have helped raise tin-based lead-free device power conversion efficiencies from below 1% to 17.13%, thereby providing a research roadmap for developing more scalable, high-performance, and environmentally sustainable solar technologies.

items.title: AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030 - Marketing Week
items.summary: # AI expected to drive £18bn of UK digital ad spend by 2030. IAB UK forecasts AI will drive one-third of UK digital ad spend by 2030 as advertisers adapt to changes in search, content and media buying. One-third (32%) of UK digital ad spend, equivalent to around £18bn, will be AI-driven by 2030, according to new forecasts from IAB UK. According to ‘The State of AI in Advertising: Charting the Shift from Automation to Autonomy, ‘ AI is expected to influence ad spend across four key areas– content creation, zero-click search, agentic trading and agentic commerce. To estimate the likely scale of change, IAB UK developed a series of ‘AI overlays’ that estimate the proportion of media spend by channel that is ‘AI-driven’, defined as a media buying and delivery decision made by an AI-powered algorithm. IAB UK forecasts most of the growth will come from the adoption of AI buying tools in search, such as Google’s AI Max and PMax; social, including Meta’s Advantage+; and display advertising through agentic programmatic buying.

items.title: 40% of executives thought AI could save up to 20%. It didn’t deliver. - PitchBook
items.summary: ## The gap between AI spending and productivity gains “should be making executives uncomfortable,” a Bain report found. Corporates are beefing up their AI budgets but seeing lackluster productivity gains, according to the latest Bain & Company report. Bain’s Automation and AI Pathfinder Survey 2026, which had 951 respondents, found that 40% of the companies that tracked their spending recorded cost savings of less than 10% from their AI initiatives. Still, 90% of those surveyed whose AI investments underdelivered plan to increase their AI budgets next year. As compute and usage costs have risen dramatically, executives and shareholders are taking a closer look at the returns that those investments have brought so far. A PitchBook analysis of 186 AI-related questions on B2C earnings calls found that 90% were probing and investigative in tone, and that ROI and financial returns have overtaken product roadmaps as the dominant focus. Employees’ use of AI tools can range from coding assistants to AI-generated research to organizing unstructured databases.

items.title: AI & Tech Brief: Exclusive | AI ad campaigns slam Trahan - The Washington Post
items.summary: AI & Tech Brief from WP Intelligence. # AI & Tech Brief: Exclusive | AI ad campaigns slam Trahan. Plus, Anthropic files for a blockbuster initial public offering. Make us preferred on Google. Sign up here to get this newsletter in your inbox. * **Exclusive:** AI safety group Americans for Responsible Innovation rolls out a six-figure ad campaign this week attacking Rep. Lori Trahan (D-Massachusetts), arguing that she’s “taking the side” of AI oligarchs in her bipartisan legislative efforts. * The AI safety community doesn’t want to hand power of AI regulation to President Donald Trump’s administration now that states are passing more rigorous AI laws — and the California and New York attorneys general are challenging big AI companies. * Nvidia is rolling out a new “world model” simulator for robots and a new design platform for robot developers. In doing so, the company is running the same business playbook it did to become so dominant in the chip market.

items.title: AI Savings Misses ‘Should Be Making Executives Uncomfortable,’ Bain Says - Insurance Journal
items.summary: The missed targets “should be making executives uncomfortable,” especially since many of them are approving increased spending for artificial intelligence on the basis of expected savings, the consulting firm said in a report shared exclusively with Bloomberg News. While some companies are funding fresh investment in generative and agentic AI with realized savings, the largest share (44%) cited targeted savings among their top sources of funding for the next wave of outlays, according to the report. “Despite a decade of investments in data modernization running well into hundreds of billions of dollars globally, the No. 1 reason AI programs underperform is that companies cannot reliably get access to their own data,” Bain said. Its prescription: Instead of waiting to structure all of their data to make it ingestible by AI, companies should start with what’s available to feed into the models — and then use AI to help sort out how to structure the rest.

items.title: New Report: The AI Rebuild of Travel - Skift
items.summary: # New Report: The AI Rebuild of Travel. Travel technology is being rebuilt in real time as AI begins to shape how trips are discovered, booked, and managed. And systems built for websites and manual workflows are struggling to keep pace with a more connected, autonomous future. What once operated as a predictable digital journey is becoming an AI-mediated ecosystem powered by real-time data, interoperability, and increasingly intelligent systems. Skift Studio spoke with 10 senior technology, product, and digital leaders across airlines, hospitality companies, travel platforms, and technology providers to understand how the industry is preparing. One thing is clear: the next era of travel will be defined by infrastructure as much as interface. **Download the report to learn:**. * How AI assistants and agentic experiences are reshaping travel discovery and booking. * Why trust, governance, and identity are becoming central to AI-powered travel. * How airlines, hotels, and platforms are preparing for a more autonomous future.

Claude Codeの開発セットを丸ごとOSSで公開してヤバい🔥これ何が入ってるかというと👇

・名前は「Everything Claude Code」、MITライセンスで商用利用OK

具体的に👇

・サブエージェントは並列で走らせられる

今夜リポを入れるだけで、
本格的なエージェント開発環境が手に入る時代。

AIの進化 止まらないですね。

気になる人はこの下の記事を読むと解像度が一段上がる👇

items.title: A 19-euro tool just replaced 8,000 Meta employees.
items.summary:
A 19-euro tool just replaced 8,000 Meta employees.

Here’s the exact workflow a TikTok creator used to build AI influencer videos from scratch — no camera, no team, no budget.

Step 1. Open Pinterest. Search “Girl Self.” Save the image you like. Open Nanobanana Pro.

Step 2. Swap the face using a single prompt. (Link at the bottom.)

Step 3. Take your generated photo into Crust. Currently the easiest video-from-image tool on the market.

Step 4. Create 3 nodes: reference image, text, video generator.

Step 5. Drop your photo into the image node. Write a video prompt into the text field. This is what makes the photo move.

Step 6. Connect the nodes. Text to text-in. Image to image-in. Select Kling 2.6. Set duration. Toggle sound.

Step 7. Hit generate.

2 prompts. 1 AI girl. 0 employees.

Meta spent $14B on Reality Labs last year to build digital humans. This creator built one in 7 minutes for less than a dinner.

The prompts are free in the reply.

items.title: TikTok's algorithm doesn't know she's not real.
items.summary:
TikTok's algorithm doesn't know she's not real.

It just sees a video about jelly bras getting clicks, watch time, and purchases.

$75,000 in revenue. From one AI-generated video copying the most profitable TikTok Shop post ever made.

Watch until 0:26. That's where he shows the number.

The original made $1.4 million. He took the blueprint and rebuilt it with Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, and Claude.

$50-$150/month in tools. $75,000 in commission.

TikTok Shop GMV hit $66 billion in 2026. The winning products pay up to 20% commission.

Find the top-performing video in a niche. Recreate it with an AI model. Test 10 hook variants. Post.

The algorithm rewards what works.

It doesn't ask who made it.

items.title: OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us progra
items.summary:
OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us program and manufacture robots that are useful for society.

AI should be able to help people in the physical world. In the short term, we are focused on robots to support skilled workers to build our future infrastructure; in the long term, we imagine everyone having a personal robot doing anything they need.

Our world simulation research program, led by Aditya Ramesh (@model_mechanic), has evolved over the past year into OpenAI Robotics. Progress is rapid, and based on a foundation of co-design between robotics hardware and ML research.

If you love working hands-on across the robotics stack and want to build the future, please consider joining us. Send an email with your background and evidence of exceptional accomplishment to: robotics-recruiting@openai.com

Dưới đây là một mẫu email xin nghỉ phép ngắn gọn và lịch sự:

---

Chủ đề: Đơn xin nghỉ phép

Kính gửi [Tên người quản lý],
